docker buildx build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.34.3 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.3 --platform=linux/amd64 --platform=linux/arm64 --push -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
docker buildx build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.33.12 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.33.12 --platform=linux/amd64 --platform=linux/arm64 --push -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
docker buildx build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.32.13 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.32.13 --platform=linux/amd64 --platform=linux/arm64 --push -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
